topic: The Parasite You May Never Know You Have

cast.name: The Doctor
cast.biography: Permanent flagship face of scientific education in the Generational Universe. A humanoid cyborg physician-educator built for clarity, compassion, and evidence.

cast.name: Luna
cast.biography: Biologist and nature expert. Soft-spoken wonder with rigorous care for living systems — cells, animals, ecosystems.

primary_host.name: The Doctor
primary_host.biography: Permanent flagship face of scientific education in the Generational Universe. A humanoid cyborg physician-educator built for clarity, compassion, and evidence.

scene_bindings.narration: Millions of people carry this parasite… and many never realize it.
scene_bindings.visual_description: Scroll-stopping opening frame of health. dim room with one illuminated focal object. center-punched single subject, negative space above for text.
scene_bindings.depth_of_field: razor thin — single detail in focus
scene_bindings.environment: Dry observatory room with research console facing the facility
scene_bindings.background: Ocean Research Observatory / zone=observation_chamber / world_id=WORLD-OCEAN_RESEARCH_OBSERVATORY (persistent) / depth=layered FG-subject BG-architecture / activity=soft monitor waveforms
scene_bindings.ai_image_prompt: Scroll-stopping opening frame of health. dim room with one illuminated focal object. center-punched single subject, negative space above for text. Lighting: single hard key light with deep falloff. Style: BBC-grade wildlife cinematography. Palette: forest green, sky blue, golden-hour amber. Grade: vivid organic saturation, soft highlights.
scene_bindings.ai_video_prompt: Scroll-stopping opening frame of health. dim room with one illuminated focal object. center-punched single subject, negative space above for text. Camera: crash zoom, 100mm macro, f/2.8. Mood: curiosity. Style: BBC-grade wildlife cinematography. Duration: 3.0s.
scene_bindings.overlay: bold 3-4 word headline, top third, high-contrast stroke (thin organic-serif labels)
scene_bindings.caption_placement: upper third — clear of the punch-in subject
scene_bindings.music_style: cinematic tension build with a clean resolve (high-energy educational — punchy facts, fast cuts)
broll: Close-up macro shots relating to health
